name: Sour Cream Chocolate Chip Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions: For the topping: In a small bowl, combine the topping ingredients (chocolate chips). Mix well and set aside. For the cake: Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. In a large bowl, cream butter, sugar, and vanilla until creamy. Beat in eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Gradually mix in the flour mixture alternately with sour cream. Fold in remaining chocolate chips. Spread the batter in a greased 9 x 13 inch baking pan. Sprinkle topping over the batter. Bake at 350°F for 45-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the middle comes out clean. Cool completely in the pan, then cut and serve. Makes 24 servings. Each serving contains 0 calories, 9g fat, 3g protein, 27.5g carbs, and 240mg sodium. Percent of calories from fat is 0%.
